### Gang: House Cawdor

* **Allegiance.** Your Warband counts as either an Imperial or Outlaw Warband, your choice upon Warband creation.  
* **Path of Faith.** You have a pool of Miracles, beginning at 0 at the start of each battle. You gain Miracles in the following circumstances:  
* **Slay.** Whenever one of your GANGER models takes an enemy Elite model Out of Action, you gain 1 Miracle.  
* **Martyr.** Whenever one of your Elite GANGER models is taken Out of Action, you gain 1 Miracle.  
* **Hold.** Whenever you succeed at a Morale test, you gain 1 Miracle.

  You can spend Miracles as if they were BLESSING MARKERS on any of your GANGER models.

* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as either a Word-Keeper or a Priest, costs \+10 credits, and gains the following ability:  
  * **The Path We Follow.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, the Gang Leader can pray for divine intervention. On a success, you gain 1 Miracle.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is either a Deacon or Firebrand, gaining the corresponding ability below:  
  * **Deacon:** During a turn in which this model has Charged, it can make a single additional melee attack with one weapon when it takes the Fight Action, but it suffers \-1 DICE to Hit with all melee attacks during that action if it does.  
  * **Firebrand:** The first time during each Turn that this model takes an enemy model Out of Action, you gain 1 Miracle, in addition to any others you would gain.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Brethren. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains either the Deacon or Firebrand ability listed for Champions above.  
* **Juves.** Your Juves are known as Bonepickers. Up to two of them can be upgraded to Zealots for a cost of \+5 credits each. If they are upgraded to a Ganger later, they retain this upgrade, including its cost and limits.  
  * **Zealot:** **Fanatical.** The Zealot is immune to the effects of the FEAR keyword.  
* **Ridge Walkers.** You cannot purchase any Ridgerunners.

#### House Cawdor Unique Battlekit

* **Asbestos Mandilion.** The equipped model gains NEGATE FIRE.  
* **Autogun Polearm.** BLOCK, CUMBERSOME, TWO-HANDED  
  * Strike: Melee  
  * Shoot: 24”, AUTOMATIC 2, \-1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT  
* **Blunderbuss Polearm.** BLOCK, CUMBERSOME, TWO-HANDED  
  * Strike: Melee  
  * Shoot: 10”, SHRAPNEL  
* **Cherub.** Once per battle, when this model spends a Miracle, you gain 1 Miracle.  
* **Explosive Crossbow.** 30”  
  * Frag: BLAST 2”, SHRAPNEL  
  * Krak: ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Frag Lance.** Melee, TWO-HANDED, BLAST 2”, SHRAPNEL, \-1 INJURY DICE against wielder, Shield Combo  
* **Krak Lance.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, RISKY, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo  
* **Ridge Walker.** The equipped model is mounted on a small walker. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, and a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo.

#### 0-3 Bomb Delivery Rat (Cost: 25 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Bomb Delivery Rat | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \-1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Bomb Delivery Rat is equipped with its Bomb and nothing else. It is always considered to be equipped with a Close Combat Weapon.

**Abilities**

* **Expendable.** The Bomb Delivery Rat is not counted as part of your Warband for the purposes of Morale.  
* **Kaboom.** The Bomb Delivery Rat can trigger its bomb at any point during its Activation or when an enemy comes within 3” of it. This does not require a Success Roll. When detonated, the explosion is treated as a BLAST 3” weapon targeting the rat model. Models within 1” of the rat hit by the explosion roll their injuries with \+1 DICE. The rat is automatically a casualty.  
* **Skitter.** The Bomb Delivery Rat has \+1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls.  
* **Tiny.** Injury rolls made against the Bomb Delivery Rat have \+1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, NO PROMOTION, STEALTH

#### 0-2 Sheen Bird (Cost: 40 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sheen Bird | 8”/Flying | N/A | \+0 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sheen Bird is not equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment. It is always considered to be equipped with a Close Combat Weapon.

**Abilities**

* **Bate.** At the start of its Activation, if the Sheen Bird’s owner is Down or Out of Action, and if there are any enemy models within 12” that it can see, the Sheen Bird’s first action must be to Charge the closest enemy.  
* **Pet.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Sheen Bird forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Rake Away.** Enemy models never get free attacks against the Sheen Bird when it Retreats, and the Sheen Bird can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, FLYING, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Stig-Shambler (Cost: 110 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Stig-Shambler | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 40-50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Stig-Shambler is equipped with Standard Armour, a Twin-Linked Heavy Stubber, and a Two-Handed Hammer, included in its price and its statistics above. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Twin-Linked Heavy Stubber.** 36”, \+1 DICE, AUTOMATIC 2

**Abilities**

* **Intelligent Control.** The Stig-Shambler treats Dash Success Rolls as if they were not Risky.

**Keywords**  
GANGER, LARGE, LIMITED POTENTIAL

### Gang: House Delaque

* **Allegiance.** Your Warband counts as either an Imperial or Outlaw Warband, your choice upon Warband creation.  
* **Psychoteric Choirs.** While within 3” of at least one other PSYKER ally, your models have \+1 DICE to all PSYCHIC Success Rolls.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Master of Shadow and gains the following abilities:  
  * **Unsanctioned Psyker.** The Master of Shadow gains the PSYKER 2 Keyword. Select one House Dalaque Psychic Discipline. The Master of Shadow may purchase up to four powers from that Discipline, and must purchase at least one. It must be equipped with exactly one PSYCHIC Weapon.  
  * **Power Unleashed.** The Master of Shadow has PERILOUS ±1 with all psychic powers.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is either a Nacht-Ghul or Phantom, gaining the corresponding ability below:  
  * **Nacht-Ghul: From the Shadows.** The Nacht-Ghul gains the INFILTRATOR and STEALTH Keywords.  
  * **Phantom:** **Unsanctioned Psyker.** The Phantom gains the PSYKER 1 Keyword. Select one House Dalaque Psychic Discipline. The Phantom may purchase up to three powers from that Discipline, and must purchase at least one. It must be equipped with exactly one PSYCHIC Weapon.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Ghosts. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains either the Nacht-Ghul or Phantom ability listed for Champions above.  
* **Juves.** Your Juves are known as Shadows. Up to two of them can be upgraded to Psy-Gheists for \+5 credits each. If a Psy-Gheist is later upgraded to a Ganger, it retains this upgrade and purchased powers, including their costs and limits.  
  * **Psy-Gheist:** **Unsanctioned Psyker.** Gains the PSYKER 1 Keyword. Select one House Dalaque Psychic Discipline. The Psy-Gheist may purchase up to two powers from that Discipline, and must purchase at least one. It must be equipped with exactly one PSYCHIC Weapon.

##### Basic Ranged Weapons

Flechette Pistol	15 credits (LIMIT: 1, Elite or  
Ganger Only)

Plasma Gun	30 credits (LIMIT: 1\)

Only)

##### Equipment

Displacer Field	10 credits (Spyker Only)

#### House Delaque Unique Battlekit

* **Flechette Pistol.** 12”, \+1 DICE if shot from behind any terrain obstacles, \-1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, PISTOL, SHRAPNEL  
* **Digital Laser.** 6”, PISTOL, \-1 INJURY DICE, takes no hands, can be used in addition to any other attacks the equipped model makes, but can be used only once per battle.  
* **Displacer Field.** Attacks against a Spyker with this equipment have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Web Gauntlet.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, NONLETHAL, STUN MARKERS, STUN. Enemies cannot Retreat from the wielder.

#### Darkness Psychic Discipline

1. **A Perfect Void (3 credits, Effect).** No Range, Self, End of Turn, Injury rolls against the caster have \-1 INJURY MODIFIER, stacking with armour up to \-3.  
2. **Cacophony of Silence (5 credits, Effect).** No Range, Self, Next Activation, the caster and any allies within 6” of it have the STEALTH Keyword.  
3. **Cloak of Whispers (5 credits, Effect).** 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, enemy models do not get free attacks against the target when it Retreats, and the target can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.  
4. **Eternal Slumber (1 Glory, Attack).** 12”, \+2 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY. This attack can only be used on a Down enemy.  
5. **Penumbral Mirror (10 credits, Effect).** 12”, One Ally and One Enemy that are within 12” of one another, Immediate, remove the target ally from the battlefield then place it on the battlefield anywhere within 3” of the target enemy.  
6. **Sight Blight (3 credits, Effect).** 18”, One Enemy, Target Activation, the target has \-1 DICE to Hit with all attacks until the end of its next Activation.

#### Delusion Psychic Discipline

1. **Deceitful Thoughts (5 credits, Effect).** 8”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D3” in the direction of your choice. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate. This power cannot be used while in close combat.  
2. **Ghost and Shadow (3 credits, Effect).** 18”, Up to Three Enemies, End of Turn, the targets cannot make attacks that are not made during their Activation.  
3. **Opprobrious Curse (10 credits, Effect).** \-1 DICE, 3”, Each Enemy, each target must roll on the Injury table, with IGNORE ARMOUR.  
4. **Seen Unseen (5 credits, Effect).** 24”, One Enemy, Target Activation, the target counts as an “enemy model” to all of its allies, and it treats those allies as “enemy models.” This only affects what targets it can choose, which models its abilities affect, etc. For instance, it must Retreat in order to move away from its former allies, though they do not have to attack it if it does if they do not want to.  
5. **Spatial Psychosis (5 credits, Effect).** 18”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target falls Down. This is not a result on the Injury chart and does not cause any BLOOD MARKERS.  
6. **Suicidal Embrace (2 Glory, Effect).** 8”, One Enemy, the target must make an attack with one melee weapon of your choice that it is wielding against itself.

#### Madness Psychic Discipline

1. **Existential Barrage (3 credits, Effect).** Melee, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D6” direct away from the caster. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate.  
2. **Terrible Truths (5 credits, Effect).** No Range, No Target, End of Turn, your opponent has \-1 DICE to their Morale Test at the end of this Turn, if any.  
3. **Psychoteric Lure (7 credits, Effect).** 18”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D6” directly towards the caster. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate.  
4. **Cyclopean Gaze (5 credits, Effect).** 18”, One Enemy, Special, if the target has not yet activated this Turn, it cannot be chosen to activate this Turn until D3 of its owner’s other models have been activated, or no models not under a similar effect are available.  
5. **Craven Howl (5 credits, Effect).** \-1 DICE, 18”, One Down Enemy, Target Activation, the Target cannot stand up from Down.  
6. **Unrememberable (1 Glory, Effect).** No Range, Self, Special, enemies cannot target the caster with ranged attacks or Charges. Weapons with the Keyword BLAST affect it as normal if it is in the radius of the weapon. This effect ends if the caster moves from its exact position in any way, it makes a Ranged Attack, or an enemy model comes within 1.5” of it.

#### 0-3 Cephalopod Spektor (Cost: 55 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Cephalopod Spektor | 6”/Flying | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Cephalopod Spektor is equipped with Shock Tendrils, included in its cost. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Shock Tendrils.** Melee, FIRE, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Pet.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Cephalopod Spektor forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Threat Response (Psychic).** When the Cephalopod Spektor’s owner is taken Out of Action, each enemy model within 3” of the Cephalopod Spektor must roll on the Injury table.  
* **Watchdog.** If the Cephalopod Spektor and its owner are both legal targets for an enemy’s Charge action, the enemy cannot choose the owner.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, FLYING, NO PROMOTION

### Gang: House Escher

* **Allegiance.** Your Warband counts as either an Imperial or Outlaw Warband, your choice upon Warband creation.  
* **Chem-Alchemy.** You can ignore the CONSUMABLE property of Chem Equipment, and your GANGER models can equip up to two Chem Equipment at a time.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Queen and gains the following ability:  
  * **Alchemist.** The Alchemist can equip up to three Chem Equipment at a time.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is either a Death Maiden or Matriarch, gaining the corresponding ability below:  
  * **Death Maiden: Toxins.** The Death Maiden has \+1 DICE with weapons that have the GAS Keyword.  
  * **Matriarch:** **Deadly.** Ranged attacks the Matriarch makes that are not at Long Range have \+1 DICE.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Sisters. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains either the Death Maiden or Matriarch ability listed for Champions above. A Ganger that began as a Wyld Runner Juve must choose Matriarch.  
* **Juves.** You Juves are known as Little Sisters. Up to two of them can be upgraded to Wyld Runners for \+5 credits each. If a Wyld Runner is later upgraded to a Ganger, it retains this upgrade, including its cost and limits.  
  * **Wyld Runner:** **Run Free.** The Wyld Runner has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Hover Bikers.** You cannot purchase any Ridgerunners.

#### House Escher Armoury

##### Basic Ranged Weapons

Autogun		20 credits (LIMIT: 1\)

##### Pistols

Hand Flamer	20 credits (LIMIT: 1, Elite Only)  
Needle Pistol	15 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Plasma Pistol	20 credits (LIMIT: 1, Elite Only)

##### Special Ranged Weapons

Combi-Weapon		35 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Heavy Stubber		40 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Needle Rifle		12 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Nightshade Chem-Thrower	45 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Plasma Gun		30 credits (LIMIT: 1\)

##### Thrown Weapons

Electro-Grenades    		10 credits  
Toxin Grenades		10 credits

##### Special Melee Weapons

Chain Blade	20 credits (Elite Only)  
Power Weapon	15 credits (LIMIT: 2, Elite Only)  
Venom Claw	5 credits

##### Equipment

Cutter		45 credits (LIMIT: 3,   
    Leader, Champion,   
    Ganger, or Juve Only)

##### Chem Equipment

Bad Blood		5 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Brain Lock		5 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Hyper		5 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Jolt			7 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Night Night		5 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Puke		3 credits (LIMIT: 3\)  
Wide-Eye		5 credits (LIMIT: 2\)

#### House Escher Unique Battlekit

If another faction gains access to House Escher Chem Equipment for any reason, they treat it as CONSUMABLE.

* **Bad Blood.** When this model is hit in melee, if any BLOOD MARKERs were suffered, the attacker suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER as well. A model with NEGATE GAS ignores this effect.  
* **Brain Lock.** The model cannot be affected by PSYCHIC attacks or abilities.  
* **Cutter.** The equipped model is mounted on a hover bike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, and a movement speed of 10” and FLYING, but it has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Built-In Weapon and Turbo-Boost abilities.  
  * **Built-In Weapon.** The rider can be equipped with up to 1 additional non-Grenade ranged weapon, which does not take any hands. The rider ignores the HEAVY Keyword of this weapon, and it can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action.  
  * **Turbo Boost.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Hyper.** The model has \+2” movement and \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but suffers \-1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.  
* **Jolt.** The model treats the first Down result of the battle as a Minor Hit.  
* **Night Night.** The model does not need to make a Casualty roll at the end of battle if it was taken Out of Action. An elite model instead rolls twice on the Elite Trauma table and you choose one of the results.  
* **Nightshade Chem-Thrower.** 10”, AUTOMATIC 2, \-1 INJURY DICE, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE, GAS  
* **Puke.** The model has NEGATE GAS.  
* **Venom Claw.** Melee, GAS, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Wide-Eye.** The model ignores penalties to its attack Success Rolls besides Cover, Long Range, and BLOOD MARKERS (including INFECTION and STUN), as well as penalties or limits to the range of its ranged weapons.

### Gang: House Goliath

* **Allegiance.** Your Warband counts as either an Imperial or Outlaw Warband, your choice upon Warband creation.  
* **Gene Smithing.** All of your GANGER models can ignore the effects of the HEAVY Keyword for one piece of battlekit. Your ELITE models instead have the STRONG Keyword.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Forge Tyrant and gains the following ability:  
  * **Hardy.** Melee attacks have \-1 INJURY DICE against the Forge Tyrant.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is either a Stimmer or Forge Boss, gaining the corresponding ability below:  
  * **Stimmer: Bulked Up.** The Stimmer has \+1 INJURY DICE in melee, and gains the LARGE Keyword.  
  * **Forge Boss:** **Bulwark of Muscle.** If any ally within 1” of the Forge Boss is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Forge Boss instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Forge Boss.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Bruisers. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains either the Stimmer or Forge Boss ability listed for Champions above.  
* **Juves.** You Juves are known as Bullies. Up to two of them can be upgraded to Forge-Born for \+5 credits each. If a Forge-Born is later upgraded to a Ganger, it retains this upgrade, including its cost and limits.  
  * **Forge-Born:** **Child of the Forge.** The Forge-Born has NEGATE FIRE.  
* **Maulers.** You cannot purchase any Ridgerunners.

#### House Goliath Armoury

##### Basic Ranged Weapons

Bolt Carbine	15 credits  
Boltgun		12 credits

##### Pistols

Bolt Pistol		10 credits  
Hand Flamer	20 credits (LIMIT: 1, Elite Only)

##### Special Ranged Weapons

Combi-Weapon	35 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Grenade Launcher	40 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Heavy Stubber	40 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Melta Gun		3 Glory (LIMIT: 1\)  
Stub Cannon	20 credits (LIMIT: 2\)

##### Heavy Ranged Weapons

Heavy Bolter		40 credits (LIMIT: 2\)

#### House Goliath Unique Battlekit

* **Mauler.** The equipped model is mounted on a heavy bike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, a movement speed of 8”/Infantry, and an additional \-1 INJURY MODIFIER (does not stack with a shield), but it has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Built-In Weapon, Power Ram, and Turbo-Boost abilities.  
  * **Built-In Weapon.** The rider can be equipped with up to 1 additional non-Grenade ranged weapon, which does not take any hands. The rider ignores the HEAVY Keyword of this weapon, and it can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action.  
  * **Power Ram.** When the rider successfully Charges one or more enemies, one of them gains a BLOOD MARKER.  
  * **Turbo Boost.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but it cannot climb sheer surfaces.  
* **Stub Cannon.** 18”, \-1 INJURY DICE, RISKY, TWO-HANDED. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line D3” directly away from the wielder.

#### 0-1 Sumpkroc (Cost: 55 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sumpkroc | 5”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | \-1 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sumpkroc is equipped with its Ferocious Jaws, included in its cost. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Ferocious Jaws.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Counter-Charge.** When an enemy declares a charge against it, the Sumpkroc can immediately attempt to Charge that enemy before it rolls its charge distance. If the Sumpkroc ends its Charge in close combat with that enemy, it can make a single melee attack against it.  
* **Pet.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Sumpkroc forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, LARGE, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 ‘Zerker (Cost: 95 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| ‘Zerker | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | 0 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The ‘Zerker is equipped with two Open Fists, included in its cost. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Open Fist.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER

**Abilities**

* **Enraged.** Injury rolls made against the ‘Zerker have \-1 DICE.  
* **Stim Up.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the ‘Zerker can take more stims. If it succeeds, it can make an additional attack during this Activation when it takes the Fight Action. If it fails, it suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER.

**Keywords**  
GANGER, LARGE, LIMITED POTENTIAL, STRONG, TOUGH

### Gang: House Orlock

* **Allegiance.** Your Warband counts as either an Imperial or Outlaw Warband, your choice upon Warband creation.  
* **Legendary Names.** Keep track of how many Glorious Deeds each of your GANGER models has scored. If they are ELITE, they gain additional skills, chosen in the same manner as when gained through XP, when they have scored 2, 4, 7, 10, 14, and 18 Glorious Deeds. If a model is promoted to ELITE, it immediately gains the appropriate number of skills.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Road Champion and gains the following ability:  
  * **Living Legend.** Whenever the Road Champion scores a Glorious Deed, you gain twice as much Glory.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is either a Arms Master or Road Sergeant, gaining the corresponding ability below:  
  * **Arms Master: Rule of Iron.** The Arms Master gains the LEADER Keyword.  
  * **Road Sergeant:** **Gas Up.** The Road Sergeant and GANGER allies within 4” of it have \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Gunners, and cannot choose the Bruiser Speciality. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains either the Watcher or Stormcaller ability listed for Champions above.  
* **Juves.** You Juves are known as Greenhorns. Up to two of them can be upgraded to Wreckers for \+5 credits each. If a Wrecker is later upgraded to a Ganger, it retains this upgrade, including its cost and limits.  
  * **Wrecker:** **Jump Booster.** Once during its Activation, when the Wrecker (any single Movement or Dash Action), it can use this ability to gain a 12” movement speed and FLYING during that movement. After this movement, it must make a Risky Success Roll, modified depending on how far they moved. On a failure, the Wrecker is knocked Down and must roll on the Injury table.  
    * 0-3”: \+2 DICE.  
    * 4-6”: \+1 DICE.  
    * 7-9”: No modifier.  
    * 10-12”: \-1 DICE.  
* **Road Warriors.** You can purchase up to 3 Ridgerunners.

#### House Orlock Unique Battlekit

* **Outrider Quad.** The equipped model is mounted on a quad bike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the TOUGH and VEHICLE Keywords, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, and an additional \-1 INJURY MODIFIER (does not stack with a shield), but it has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Manned Turret and Outrider abilities.  
  * **Manned Turret.** The rider can be equipped with up to 1 additional non-Grenade ranged weapon, which does not take any hands. The rider ignores the HEAVY Keyword of this weapon, and it can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action.  
  * **Outrider.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but it cannot climb sheer surfaces.

#### 0-3 Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 55 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Cyber Mastiff | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Cyber Mastiff is equipped with its Savage Bite, included in its cost. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Savage Bite.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 1

**Abilities**

* **Cyber Swiftness.** The Cyber Mastiff has \+1 DICE to all Dash and Jump Success Rolls.  
* **Loyal Protector.** Enemies in melee with the Cyber Mastiff cannot attack its owner.  
* **Pet.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Cyber Mastiff forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Watchdog.** If the Cyber Mastiff and its owner are both legal targets for an enemy’s Charge action, the enemy cannot choose the owner.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, NO PROMOTION

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |

| Lugger | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | 0 | 32-40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Lugger can be equipped with any one ranged weapon, as well as Standard Armour or Heavy Armour. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment except for a Scope. It is always considered to be equipped with a Close Combat Weapon.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH

### Gang: House Van Saar

* **Allegiance.** Your Warband counts as either an Imperial or Outlaw Warband, your choice upon Warband creation.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Prime and gains the following ability:  
  * **Best Tek.** The Prime has VICIOUS 11, or VICIOUS 10 if the weapon already has VICIOUS 11\. In addition, while wearing any armour, the Prime suffers no BLOOD MARKER on an Injury roll of 3 or lower. Finally the Prime has \+1 DICE on all Success Rolls granted by any Equipment it is equipped with.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is either a Archeotek or Augmek, gaining the corresponding ability below:  
  * **Archeotek: Master of Cyberteknika.** When recruited, the Archeotek can be equipped with up to 15 credits worth of Cyberteknika for free.  
  * **Augmek:** **Heavy Tek.** The Augmek gains the STRONG Keyword.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Teks. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains either the Archeotek or Augmek ability listed for Champions above.  
* **Juves.** You Juves are known as Subteks. Up to two of them can be upgraded to Neoteks for \+5 credits each. If a Neotek is later upgraded to a Ganger, it retains this upgrade, including its cost and limits.  
  * **Neotek:** **Grav Cutter.** The Neotek has 8” movement and FLYING, but cannot benefit from Cover.  
* **No Bikes.** You cannot purchase any Ridgerunners.

#### House Van Saar Unique Battlekit

* **Arachni Rig.** \-2 INJURY MODIFIER. The model gains the LARGE and VEHICLE Keywords, as well as 8” movement and FLYING. This armour has the Servo Arms weapon built-in, as well as the Dual Weapons ability.  
  * **Servo Arms.** Melee. Takes no hands and can be used to make an extra attack when the wielder takes the Fight Action.  
  * **Dual Weapons.** The wearer can carry up to two TWO-HANDED ranged weapons. While equipped with two ranged weapons, it can make a Shoot Action with each of them.  
* **Rad Cannon.** 36”, \+1 INJURY DICE, BLAST 2”, GAS, RISKY  
* **Rad Rifle.** 24”, GAS, RISKY  
* **Suppression Laser.** 16”, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 within 8”

#### 0-1 Servo-Suit (Cost: 130 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Servo-Suit | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Servo-Suit is equipped with heavy armour plating, four Servo Arms, included in its cost and statistics above. It can be equipped with up to two TWO-HANDED ranged weapons from the Necromunda Gang Shared Armour or the House Van Saar Armoury, but each ranged weapon it is equipped with removes one of its Servo Arms. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Servo Arms.** Melee, IGNORE OFF-HAND and the wielder can attack with all Servo Arms as part of one Fight Action

**Abilities**

* **Dual Weapons.** While equipped with two ranged weapons, it can make a Shoot Action with each of them.

**Upgrades**

* **Super-Dense Plating.** For a cost of \+15 credits, the Servo-Suit can be equipped with super dense plating, providing an Armour of \-3 instead of \-2. This upgrade can be purchased after recruiting the Servo-Suit.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, LARGE, NEGATE GAS, NEGATE SHRAPNEL, NO PROMOTION, TOUGH

* **Venomous Bite.** Melee, GAS  
* **Web Projector.** 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, IGNORE ARMOUR, NONLETHAL, STUN MARKERS, STUN.

**Abilities**

* **Cling.** The Cyberachnid does not need to make a Success Roll to Climb.

ARTIFICIAL, FEAR, NO PROMOTION
